summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Favorite YouTube Channels feature. All backend APIs (100% pass rate) and frontend UI functionality working correctly. Video playback using iframe embed is functional.
passed_tests: Backend: POST with missing fields returns 400
Backend: YouTube search basic endpoint works
Backend: YouTube search with favorite_channels parameter works
Frontend: Add channel via input field and Add button works
Frontend: Remove channel via X button works
Frontend: Popular channel suggestions show checkmark when already added
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - proper data-testid attributes on all interactive elements
Favorite channels hook properly handles loading/error states
Backend properly validates required fields (channel_id, channel_name)
seed_data_creation: Test channels created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Favorite YouTube Channels feature fully tested and working. Backend APIs at /api/preferences/favorite-channels support GET, POST, DELETE. Frontend UI on /planner page has collapsible section with add/remove functionality. Video playback uses iframe embed (not react-player component directly visible in DOM). Existing favorite channels: Ranveer Brar, Kabitas Kitchen.

mocked_apis.Translation API: /api/translate uses static dictionary instead of Google Translate API
